_comment: Angels guild layer for 3s. Like Necromancers, this guild has NO private MIP tag - vitals ride the mud-wide FFF composite feed (A=hp C=sp E=gp1 G=gp2). Maxes self-calibrate from peak observed value. Cascade rule REPLACE (character file wins).
Pool labels CONFIRMED by matching score's Gp1/Gp2 to the named gscore readout on 2026-06-15.

Attack: 'kill first' - self-targets ONE mob (the first), so Hunt fights one at a time. Alt 'kill all' attacks every mob in the room at once (they all aggro you - riskier for solo hunting). Angels can self-target, unlike most 3s guilds which need an explicit target.
